attribution.Zelda Breath Of The Wild ver 1.6 by Patj:
Search address 64 unsigned value .

447A000042C80000

Then enter on the only available Address
Move down 1 line and starting from the left you will see 00 00 80 3f

Change the value to ..................................   00 00 80 bf

To return to the ground after moonjumping change the address back to 3f
attribution.The Legend of Zelda Breath of the Wild.t:
Included in the text file;

Resolution Hacks By @Hazerou
RRS cheats rely on Dynamic Resolution Function. If you have a mod or cheat that disables it, it will not work
RRS will stop DRS from controlling your Resolution up and down
Don't use old resolution codes previously here with new RRS as it can cause crashes and unxpected resolutions
Docked RRS v2 cheats may crash the gaem if used in handheld mode

FOV Codes by masagrator
Main FOV won't be visible immediately, you must trigger change by f.e. aiming with bow and hiding bow or turn on Current FOV matching your FOV and immediately turn off. It is not advised to have Current FOV constantly turned on.
